name: @stackra/container
purpose: Client-side dependency injection container for browser and React — decorators, modules, lifecycle hooks, and metadata-driven discovery.
capabilities: @Module() dynamic module system with forRoot / forFeature
when_to_use: Composing services, providers, and modules across the framework with typed DI and metadata-driven discovery.
when_not_to_use: For plain functional composition without DI use @stackra/support helpers; for shared vocabulary use @stackra/contracts.
